topStories.description: The legislative blueprint of the National Policy Framework for AI for Congress is split into seven broad categories, ranging from online safety laws for children to the protection of free speech and the streamlining of AI infrastructure.

topStories.title: Assam CM, regional party chiefs file nominations
topStories.description: State Congress president Gaurav Gogoi seeks a coordinated fight by the Opposition bloc to remove Himanta Biswa Sarma from power

topStories.title: Bypolls: BJP ahead in candidate selection, Congress weighs options
topStories.description: The bypolls have been necessitated owing to the deaths of incumbent MLAs H.Y. Meti in Bagalkot and Shamanur Shivashankarappa in Davangere; both served as Ministers during Siddaramaiah’s previous tenure as Chief Minister

topStories.title: 'Deserves perfect score': IRGC spokesman Ali Mohammad Naini lauded missile programme before US-Israel strike killed him
topStories.description: Prior to his death, Ali Mohammad Naini lauded Tehran's missile programme, stating it ‘deserves a perfect score’. Following Israeli airstrikes, Iran intensified its offensive, targeting oil infrastructure while vowing to continue missile production despite ongoing conflict.

topStories.title: Nicobarese delegation meets LoP Rahul Gandhi, says tribal lands being encroached for mega project
topStories.description: The delegation, led by Barnabas Manju, chief of the Tribal Council of Great and Little Nicobar, and Titus Peter, 1st Captain of Pulobhabi village, told Mr. Gandhi and other Congress leaders that their appeals to the government regarding the ₹92,000 crore project on Great Nicobar Island have been ignored

topStories.title: US easing ban on Iranian oil would signal ‘beginning of the end of war’
topStories.description: The US says it is considering removing sanctions on Iranian oil stranded on tankers at sea.

topStories.title: Chuck Norris dies at 86: All about the Walker, Texas Ranger star’s cause of death, films and famous jokes
topStories.description: The 86-year-old actor was admitted to a hospital in Hawaii — just days after celebrating his 86th birthday — after an unknown incident occurred on the island of Kauai.

topStories.title: Cyberattack on vehicle breathalyzer company leaves drivers stranded across the US
topStories.description: A cyberattack on a U.S. car breathalyzer company has left drivers across the United States reportedly stranded and unable to start their vehicles.

topStories.title: Will Russian oil be the biggest winner in the US-Israel war on Iran?
topStories.description: The price of Russian Urals has soared in recent weeks. How Russia - and other energy producing nations - could profit.

topStories.title: ‘Not marrying a maid’: Supreme Court says wife's refusal to do household chores not cruelty
topStories.description: On the husband seeking divorce on grounds of cruelty, the court highlighted that times have changed and the husband must also contribute to household chores.

topStories.title: Injured Cristiano Ronaldo Misses Portugal World Cup Friendlies
topStories.description: Cristiano Ronaldo, who is currently nursing a hamstring injury, was on Friday left out of the Portugal squad to play pre-World Cup friendlies against tournament co-hosts Mexico and the United States...

topStories.title: Who Was Chuck Norris? Iconic Action Star Dies At 86, Family Issues Statement
topStories.description: He rose to fame with films like Missing in Action, The Delta Force, and Code of Silence, and later became a household name with the long-running television series Walker, Texas Ranger.

dailyNews.title: ‘Unconscious, leaned onto cord’: What is the ‘Blackout’ social media challenge that claimed one life in Texas?
dailyNews.description: In 2022, a UK-based media report mentioned that at least 20 deaths had been linked to the blackout challenge within 18 months, with 15 of the victims being 12 or younger. Here's all you need to know about the trend which cost a nine-year-old from Texas her life

dailyNews.title: ‘Had you been neutral…’: Owaisi slams PM Modi, Pakistan over ‘siding with Israel’ in Iran war
dailyNews.description: “Modi deposited himself in the corner of Trump and Netanyahu. Had you been neutral, perhaps there would have been weight in your words,” AIMIM chief said.

dailyNews.title: Iran video said to show US F-35 being hit
dailyNews.description: Iran’s semi-official Tasnim news agency has released military video said to show air defence systems hitting a US F-35.

dailyNews.title: Jeffrey Epstein spotted in South Florida? Internet stunned as lookalike's video goes viral - See here
dailyNews.description: The clip that fueled speculations about Epstein being alive and spotted in South Florida, showed a man – who netizens said looked similar to Epstein – sporting a pair of sunglasses and a white cap as he cruised in a convertible. Here's what happened next

dailyNews.description: Israeli and US air attacks pound Iran as assassination campaign of country's leadership continues.

dailyNews.title: I didn't know Epstein was a predator - Norway's crown princess
dailyNews.description: Norway's Crown Princess Mette-Marit has said that she wishes she had never met late US sex offender Jeffrey Epstein

dailyNews.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Security concerns grow in US as funding stalls
dailyNews.description: US preparations fall behind for FIFA World Cup 2026, leading to growing concerns about security risks at events.

dailyNews.title: Work from home, avoid air travel: Here's what IEA suggests to ease oil price pressure on consumers amid West Asia war
dailyNews.description: The IEA advised working from home and avoiding air travel to relieve oil price pressures amid the US-Israel war with Iran. The agency suggested measures for governments and households to mitigate the economic impact of rising energy prices.

topStories.title: DAVID MARCUS: The MAGA 'civil war' over Iran is a myth
topStories.description: Polls show 83% of Republicans back Trump's Iran strikes, undermining media claims of a MAGA split over the conflict, according to L&V and Politico surveys.

topStories.description: Rep. Kevin Hern was endorsed for U.S. Senate by Senate Majority Leader John Thune and National Republican Senatorial Committee chair Sen. Tim Scott.

topStories.title: Most Americans expect Trump to send boots on the ground in Iran — but majority oppose it: Poll
topStories.description: A Reuters/Ipsos poll finds 55% of Americans oppose sending U.S. ground troops into the conflict with Iran, as nearly two-thirds fear Trump will do so.

topStories.description: Former President Bill Clinton, Kamala Harris and Michigan Democrats photographed with radical Iranian-born Imam respond to questions after Fox News Digital inquiry leads to photo purge.

topStories.title: Iran War Underscores the Diverging Aims of Trump and Netanyahu
topStories.description: The United States views Iran through a prism of global responsibilities and strategic goals. Israel has a more regional approach. After nearly three weeks of war, their paths are diverging.

topStories.description: Nearly three weeks into a war that polls show is unpopular, top Republicans have yet to call administration officials to testify about it, arguing that hearings would put divisions on display.

dailyNews.description: Plus, a buzzy new book was just canceled over A.I. allegations.

dailyNews.title: U.S. Prosecutors Investigate Colombia’s President, a Onetime Trump Foe
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department is examining whether President Gustavo Petro of Colombia has ties to drug traffickers.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Sues Harvard Over Accusations of Antisemitism
dailyNews.description: The administration had spent months investigating the Ivy League school. The two sides had been in talks to negotiate a settlement.

dailyNews.title: Trump Friend Asked ICE to Detain the Mother of His Child
dailyNews.description: Paolo Zampolli, a former modeling agent and a longtime Trump ally, was in a custody battle over his son. An ICE official agreed to help.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls NATO allies "cowards" as more Marines head toward Middle East
dailyNews.description: The Iran war is nearing the three-week mark as about 2,200 more U.S. Marines and three more warships are headed toward the region, two U.S. officials say.

dailyNews.title: U.S. sues Harvard, alleging it failed to protect Jewish and Israeli students
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration argued that Harvard unlawfully discriminated against Jewish and Israeli students, in violation of federal civil rights law.

dailyNews.title: Bipartisan talks to end Homeland Security standoff get serious as shutdown drags on
dailyNews.description: Top Republicans and Democrats trying to end the monthlong Department of Homeland Security shutdown huddled with White House border czar Tom Homan in the Capitol on Thursday.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration sues Harvard over antisemitism allegations in latest targeting of an elite university
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department filed a new lawsuit Friday against Harvard University, saying its leadership failed to address antisemitism on campus, creating grounds for the government to freeze existing grants and seek repayment for grants already paid.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin unveils national AI policy framework to limit state power
dailyNews.description: AI industry leaders have opposed state-level regulatory efforts, arguing that a "patchwork" of laws would hobble innovation and give China a competitive edge.

dailyNews.title: Elizabeth Warren demands answers on costs, economic impact of 'illegal and reckless war'
dailyNews.description: The liberal Democratic firebrand ripped President Donald Trump, whom she said has 'dragged the United States into an illegal and reckless war.'

dailyNews.title: Trump admin tasks Treasury Dept. with student loan collection. What borrowers need to know
dailyNews.description: Trump officials plan to task the Treasury Department with collecting on defaulted student loans and eventually "operational support" on current loans.

dailyNews.title: Netanyahu says Iran is being 'decimated' but revolution requires 'ground component'
dailyNews.description: Netanyahu's comments came after President Donald Trump, speaking in the Oval Office, said earlier that he would not send U.S. troops to the Middle East.
